head_commit.message:
feat: add jkconfig-web CLI for web UI configuration editing

- Implemented a command-line interface for jkconfig-web to manage configuration files and schemas.
- Added static resource embedding using rust-embed for serving frontend assets.
- Created API handlers for configuration management, including fetching, updating, and saving configurations.
- Established routing for the web server with CORS support.
- Developed a web server using axum to serve the frontend and handle API requests.
- Introduced end-to-end tests using Playwright to validate the functionality of the configuration editor.
- Set up a basic React frontend with Material UI for the configuration editor interface.
- Included TypeScript support and configured Vite for building the frontend application.
- Added test configuration and schema files for testing purposes.

run.display_title: feat: add jkconfig-web CLI for web UI configuration editing
